name: aix-text-editor
description: aixTextEditor — an LLM-augmented, chunk-based editor for academic papers and long-form reports.
author: Satoshi Kume

comments.overrides: esbuild pinned to >=0.28.1 to patch GHSA-g7r4-m6w7-qqqr (dev-server file read on Windows). vite 7.x pins esbuild ^0.27.0, but 0.28.x is API-compatible (vite 8 uses it). This is a dev/build-time tool only — not bundled into the shipped app. Remove the override once vite ships a release on a patched esbuild.
